<blockquote>[[File:Black pelt talent.gif|thumb|464x464px|Black Pelt Doggie one-shot a Zombie ]]Increases critical hit rate by half a heart per level, plus an additional heart upon mastery.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT.
* The talent can be coupled with [[Doggy Tools]] - Equip it with a sword to further increase its damage output.
